steps.title: Spot the pivotal contrast
steps.content: The final sentence “But Francie was a reader” uses a contrast word to frame Francie's identity against the preceding statement that some B's “had been hard going.” This signals that despite obstacles in her goal to read all books alphabetically, she remains committed.

steps.title: Match to the answer
steps.content:
The passage portrays determination to pursue a difficult goal.

  • A focuses on enjoying unusual topics rather than persistence
  • B assumes a preference comparison the text never makes
  • D treats a single book as central when the passage describes a systematic reading plan covering many books
.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
